currentPolicy.civilTimeAssumption: Effective input treated as UTC+8 Beijing time
currentPolicy.solarAdjustment: Longitude correction only, not complete apparent solar time

officialAnchors.source: Hong Kong Observatory Gregorian-Lunar Calendar Conversion Table of 1999

officialAnchors.fact: True solar time offset includes equation of time, longitude, and timezone.

supportedYearBoundaryAudit.interpretation: Potential year/month mismatch exists only inside each boundary delta window, not across the entire year.

limitations: A match with lunar-javascript is V3 candidate evidence, not proof of universal correctness.
Dayun comparison reduces exact years/months/days to the current engine integer-age precision.
School-dependent policies require an explicit policy decision before a pass can be assigned.
Solar-adjusted cases validate only the current longitude-adjusted path; equation of time and historical timezone remain unimplemented.
The exact-table scan compares minute-level transitions; differences of one minute or less are retained as seconds-resolution cases, not classified as material errors.

historicalRegression.reason: Regression for the former 2024-02-04 day-pillar base error.

summary.interpretation: Potential year/month mismatch exists only inside each boundary delta window, not across the entire year.

results.note: HKO calendar places Corn on Ear on 1999-06-06.
More than one calendar day after the HKO Corn on Ear date.

adjustment.limitation: Longitude correction only; equation of time is not applied.
